events.title: Typhoon Songda
events.desc: Shanghai port operations suspended for 36h. Significant backlogs expected.

events.title: Rotterdam Port Strike
events.desc: Union action at ECT Delta terminal. Berth utilization at 0%. Diverting SHP-005 to Antwerp.

events.title: Suez Canal Congestion
events.desc: Increased wait times at Southern anchorage due to minor technical grounding. +12h delay.

events.title: US cites optimism over a deal even as Iran threatens to shut down Red Sea shipping
events.desc: Iran threatens to shut down Red Sea shipping in response to intensifying US sanctions, posing a catastrophic risk to global oil and goods transit.

events.title: Cathay Pacific Suspends Flights Amid Middle East Turmoil
events.desc: Cathay Pacific has suspended cargo services to Dubai and Riyadh due to ongoing Middle East conflict, impacting air freight logistics and supply chain operations to these key regional hubs.
